Okie dokie everyone, go on to step two of nutritional fulfillment. So you've met with them, they're weighing themselves every day, they're taking their ultimate supplement package, they've been eating off the food list, when they're following the rules of don't stuff, don't starve, eating healthy foods and weighing themselves every day, all those things combined are a brand new set of easy to incorporate behaviors that allows them to incorporate some structures into their life without stress and so you will have inevitably seen some weight drop within the first few weeks, inflammation, fat, all that good stuff. And so the next step to this process is to, one, make sure that they're still continuing to take the supplements because that is a very key factor in terms of trying to start an easy habit, something that they can do every day where they can base other healthy habits around it, alright? And you go from a food list to a meal template, probably something that you're closer, more used to seeing, where they have a specific amount of meals and at this point they will also have specific amounts of food that they will need to consume but the way they measure it will be virtue, essentially they will be eyeballing it or it will be based off of their thumb, their fist or their palm and so at this point, whereas they were kind of structuring things haphazardly before, basically going from zero to one on their own, you're going to have them go from zero to two by saying, okay, now we know that you need to have this many meals per day and about this much of a protein food, a fat food, a starch food and a vegetable, okay? And so each one of those things will have a corresponding measurement that is associated with a part of the person's hand to help them eyeball the portion. So like I said, it would be a thumb, a fist, a palm, things of that nature to allow them to eyeball a specific amount, okay? And they are still weighing themselves every day and just to be clear, they will be weighing themselves every day throughout. So to reiterate, they're going from essentially eating as much as they want to now incorporating a little bit of structure with specific amounts that they are eyeballing, okay? And they'll be doing that for two weeks and they will move on to something a little more specific with their next in person check-in.
